title: aster indamellus
intro: Aster indamellus, also known as Nootka rose or Nootka woolly aster, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Aster indamellus include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and to soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Aster indamellus is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
